title: CHACH Wax Burner, White Feather Cut Out Oil Burner, Wax Melts Round Piller Tea light Holder, Home Fragtance Oil Burners, Aroma Diffusers, Aromatherapy Accessories
features: LUXURIOUS DESIGN: Elevate your space with the elegant Ceramic pillar oil burner, this white ceramic oil burner features cut out feathers in a cute, contemporary design. Place fragrance oil or wax melts into the built-in dish with a standard tealight inside to fill the home with calming fragrance. that complements any home or office décor.
AROMATHERAPY ACCESSORY: Enhance your relaxation, meditation, or daily routine with your favorite essential oils, providing a calming ambiance and soothing fragrance for your home or office.

CLEAN LUXURY WAX MELTS: A contemporary design of five feathers is cut into one side of this oil burner.The sides are made from a white ceramic with a matt finish. On the opposite side to the feathers is a cut-out shape, which is where you access the space for a tea light.

IDEAL FOR HOME & OFFICE DECOR: With its versatile H13.5cm X W10.5cm X D10.5cm size, the oil burner fits easily on your desk, bedside table, or living room shelf, making it the perfect addition to any room's aesthetic.

CUSTOMER SATISFACTION: Our promise is to always give best product to our customers so feel free to contact us any time for any query, we are always here to help you, your queries will be answered within 24 hours.
